_comment_groupsApiBaseUrl: Set to a JSON API base URL (e.g. from WRU or browser network tab) to discover groups; leave null to use baseUrl (my.wru.wales returns HTML for /groups).
_comment_roots: To add more competition families, append objects to roots with type: competitionInstance, id (from MyWRU), and label.
_comment_groups: Discovery calls /competition/{id}/groups and /overview; my.wru.wales currently returns an HTML shell (SPA). Groups/endpoints will populate when a JSON API URL is available (e.g. from WRU or browser network tab).
_comment_families: Labels 652–660 can be updated when names are confirmed (e.g. Womens Admiral, Super Rygbi Cymru, Youth, Age Grade, Knockout).
